creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
Similar approach used for Gentoo Linux, for example:
1. Undefine "TT_CONFIG_OPTION_SUBPIXEL_HINTING  2"
https://gitweb.gentoo.org/repo/gentoo.git/tree/media-libs/freetype/freetype-2.7.1-r1.ebuild?id=85fe078abbaf6e0f0c5860583c808ead0a19f324#n69
which related to following part:
http://git.savannah.gnu.org/cgit/freetype/freetype2.git/tree/include/freetype/config/ftoption.h?h=VER-2-7-1#n678
2. Then define what was enabled:
https://gitweb.gentoo.org/repo/gentoo.git/tree/media-libs/freetype/freetype-2.7.1-r1.ebuild?id=85fe078abbaf6e0f0c5860583c808ead0a19f324#n72
